overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk waterfront district at dusk, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, flooded urban plazas, and scattered NPCs. The footage is clearly from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077 style) with cinematic lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered promenade, passing by NPCs seated on benches

NPC standing still looking at phone device

outdoor cafe umbrellas along the waterfront edge

tropical palm tree in planter box

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered waterfront promenade beneath a massive highway overpass. The area features concrete benches with seated NPCs, white cafe umbrellas, and palm trees. An NPC in a bright green jacket stands up from a bench as the camera passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway transition from covered promenade to flooded lower plaza

events.description: descending stairs from dry covered walkway into open flooded plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs leading into the flooded lower district

entered.detail: shallow water covering the ground with reflective wet surfaces
massive screen displaying anime-style character advertisement

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the covered promenade by descending a concrete staircase into a flooded lower plaza. The large digital billboard becomes visible on the left as the camera moves down toward the water-covered ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban plaza with neon advertisements and scattered debris

events.description: walking through shallow water past scattered debris and concrete barricades

agents.ego_description: walking through the flooded plaza, navigating around debris and barricades

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on the wet ground leaning against a digital advertising kiosk
two NPCs standing together near the large digital billboard

entered.detail: white and red concrete barricades partially submerged in water
tall digital sign displaying yellow advertisement with face
scattered trash, cardboard, and objects floating in the shallow water
towering futuristic buildings covered in bright neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking through the flooded Southern Piers plaza with shallow water covering the ground. The area features scattered debris, concrete barricades, and a prominent digital advertising kiosk. Neon-lit skyscrapers tower in the background while a few NPCs sit or stand amidst the flooded environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian bridge over water leading to neon-lit district

events.description: stepping onto wooden pedestrian bridge crossing the water canal
approaching group of NPCs gathered ahead on the bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing the pedestrian bridge toward a group of people, with neon city skyline ahead

notable_agents.action: group of four NPCs walking ahead on the bridge toward the neon district

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge with black metal railings crossing the water
cluster of pedestrians walking ahead on the bridge

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wooden pedestrian bridge over the water canal, leaving the flooded plaza behind. The bridge leads toward a dense group of NPCs walking ahead, with the massive neon-lit skyscraper district looming larger in the background. The environment transitions from open plaza to the enclosed bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered waterfront promenade down into a flooded urban plaza and across a bridge toward a neon-lit skyline. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, passing palm trees and white cafe umbrellas where an NPC in a bright green jacket stands up as the camera glides by. The scene then shifts as the camera descends a concrete staircase, leaving the covered walkway behind to reveal a large digital billboard and a water-covered ground. As the camera moves further into the Southern Piers plaza, the environment opens up into a shallow flood filled with debris and concrete barricades, framed by towering neon skyscrapers in the distance. Finally, the camera leaves the open plaza to cross a wooden pedestrian bridge, moving toward a group of NPCs as the massive skyscraper district looms larger in the background.
